user.title: Set up AllEars
user.description: This will register a webhook to receive data from the AllEars Android app.

webhook_url.title: Copy your webhook URL
webhook_url.description:
Paste this URL into the AllEars Android app under
Settings → Home Assistant Webhook URL:

`{webhook_url}`

Tap Submit when done.

clear_history.name: Clear Sound History
clear_history.description: Resets all stored sound detection data across all AllEars devices.

test_webhook.name: Test Webhook
test_webhook.description: Fires a synthetic AllEars sound event. Use this to verify that your HA automations are configured correctly before testing with the real Android app.
